slots.caption_ig:
Filter by mood, not the menu. Michelin night. Date night. Walk-in. Tap the moment. The dish that fits your vibe in 3 taps. Free iOS beta.

#ForkFox #DateNight #MichelinFood #FoodAI #DishNotRestaurant
slots.caption_fb: Some nights you want Michelin. Some nights you want a walk-in dive. Same city, different mood. We added a filter that picks the dish based on the moment — date night, ambiance, walk-in availability, price tier — not just cuisine.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 7 seconds. A finger taps mood pills: 'Michelin', 'Date night', 'Walk-in'. Each tap shifts the dish on screen. End frame: 'Filter by mood.' with 'mood' in red. Soft jazz piano background.
